docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY MCCLAY, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT LIPPINCOTT, ALLISON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA MCCLAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLISON LIPPINCOTT IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLAY, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIPPINCOTT, ALLISON $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
